title: stylisma evolvuloides
intro: Stylisma evolvuloides, also known as the Sea Lavender or Swamp-Bluecurl, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antibacterial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Stylisma evolvuloides include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
